name: Sync Geocercas from Wialon to Google Sheets

nodes.name: Login Wialon
nodes.notes: Authenticate to Wialon API using n8n environment variables

nodes.name: Obtener Recursos
nodes.notes: Get all resource accounts that may contain geofences

nodes.name: Buscar Recursos con Geocercas
nodes.notes: Search for all resources (accounts) in Wialon

nodes.name: Obtener Geocercas del Recurso
nodes.notes: Get all geofences from each resource

nodes.name: Transformar Datos de Geocercas
nodes.notes: Convert Wialon geofence format to Google Sheets format

nodes.name: Limpiar Hoja Geocercas
nodes.notes: Clear existing geofence data (keep header row)

nodes.name: Actualizar Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Write all geofences to Google Sheets
